en.extract:
The dusky lark (Pinarocorys nigricans), also known as the dusky bush lark or rufous-rumped bush lark, is a species of migratory lark in the family Alaudidae. It is native to southern Central Africa.


Range
It is found in southern Central Africa; it is a summer migrant to more southerly areas. Its natural habitats are dry savannah and subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland.


Taxonomy and systematics
Formerly, the dusky lark was classified as belonging to the genera Alauda and Mirafra until moved to Pinarocorys.


Subspecies
Two subspecies are recognized: 

P. n. nigricans (Sundevall, 1850): Found in south-eastern DR Congo, north-western Zambia and south-western Tanzania
P. n. occidentis Clancey, 1968: Found in south-western DR Congo and northern Angola


References

overwintering range in yellow }} The '''dusky lark''' ('''''Pinarocorys nigricans'''''), also known as the '''dusky bush lark''' or '''rufous-rumped bush lark''', is a species of migratory [[lark]] in the family [[Alaudidae]].{{Cite web|url=http://avibase.bsc-eoc.org/species.jsp?avibaseid=511C1E5A797CBD71|title=Pinarocorys nigricans - Avibase|website=avibase.bsc-eoc.org|access-date=2016-12-09}} It is native to southern Central Africa. ==Range== It is found in southern [[Central Africa]]; it is a summer migrant to more southerly areas. Its natural [[habitat]]s are dry [[savannah]] and subtropical or tropical dry lowland [[grassland]].{{Cite web|url= http://sabap2.adu.org.za/docs/sabap1/505.pdf|title=South African Bird Atlas Project 2|last=|first=|date=|website=|publisher=|access-date= November 10, 2016}} ==Taxonomy and systematics== Formerly, the dusky lark was classified as belonging to the genera ''[[Alauda]]'' and ''[[Mirafra]]'' until moved to ''Pinarocorys''. === Subspecies === Two [[subspecies]] are recognized:{{Cite journal|title=IOC World Bird List 6.4|url=http://www.worldbirdnames.org/ioc-lists/crossref|journal=IOC World Bird List Datasets|doi=10.14344/ioc.ml.6.4|doi-access=free}} * ''P. n. nigricans'' ([[Carl Jakob Sundevall|Sundevall]], 1850): Found in south-eastern [[Democratic Republic of Congo|DR Congo]], north-western [[Zambia]] and south-western [[Tanzania]] * ''P. n. occidentis'' [[Phillip Clancey|Clancey]], 1968: Found in south-western DR Congo and northern [[Angola]] ==References== {{Commons category|Pinarocorys nigricans}} {{Wikispecies|Pinarocorys nigricans}} {{Reflist}} {{Taxonbar|from=Q512594}} [[Category:Pinarocorys|dusky lark]] [[Category:Birds of Central Africa]] [[Category:Birds described in 1850|dusky lark]] [[Category:Taxonomy articles created by Polbot]] {{Alaudidae-stub}}

zh.extract:
黑歌百灵（学名：Pinarocorys nigricans），是百灵科的一种，是全面迁徙的候鸟，分布于纳米比亚、安哥拉、南非、斯威士兰、马拉维、坦桑尼亚、津巴布韦、赞比亚、刚果民主共和国、博茨瓦纳和莫桑比克。全球活动范围约为3,880,000平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
黑歌百灵的平均体重约为38.1克。栖息地包括干燥的稀树草原和亚热带或热带的（低地）干草原。


参考文献

Pinarocorys nigricans. BirdLife.org.   [2011-06-27]. （原始内容存档于2016-03-04）.
